strengths: 19+ years of hands-on software engineering across web, mobile, desktop, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems
Entrepreneurial track record as founder of GISCollective, an open-source geo-data platform with real-world adoption
Recent hands-on AI-agent infrastructure work (MCP code generators, agentic workflow tooling) plus strong knowledge-sharing history via talks and workshops
concerns: No principal/director-level scope demonstrated — career has remained at senior/staff IC level on feature and product work
AI experience is recent and tooling-focused, not the recognized AI expertise or shipped AI products/platforms the role prefers
No advanced degree in an AI-related field and no evidence of strategic advisory work with executives, customers, or partners

key_factors.factor: Lack of principal-level and AI-strategy leadership experience
Meets 15-year experience and degree minimums with broad technical range
Emerging but shallow AI/cloud platform credentials relative to role's preferred profile

response.justification: The candidate comfortably clears the minimum bar — a technical bachelor's degree and roughly 19 years of diverse engineering experience — and shows entrepreneurial initiative and genuine recent exposure to AI-agent tooling. However, this is a director-level strategy role requiring recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products or platforms, and the ability to advise strategic customers and inspire organizations. The resume reflects a strong senior/staff-level builder and craftsman, not a principal engineer operating at strategic scope, and the AI credentials are early-stage rather than authoritative. The gap is in level and AI depth, not competence.
